description: Custom Content Understanding analyzer for architectural PDF drawings.

drawing_title.description: Title block drawing name or sheet title if visible.

drawing_type.description: Drawing type: floor_plan, elevation, section, detail, or site_plan.

spaces.description: Rooms and circulation spaces with name, classification, area_m2, clear_width_mm, clear_height_mm.

openings.description: Doors and windows with opening_type, width_mm, height_mm, swing_direction.

dimensions.description: Explicit dimension annotations: label, value_mm, axis, linked_element.

building_elements.description: Stairs, ramps, landings with element_type and dimensional properties.
